extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz caught breakaway leader Magnus Cort in final 75-100 meters on steep uphill finish, gaining 21 seconds on GC rivals through time bonuses and gaps.
tactical_patterns: Movistar using Erviti to position on Cat 2 climb reveals they're managing Lopez/Mas aggressively unlike previous passive tactics.
Roglic waited until final 50 meters to go to front, converting minimal energy expenditure into 21-second GC gain.
Magnus Cort nearly held off peloton despite solo work entire climb, showing steep finishes neutralize chase advantages.
Mas second on stage but lost 3 seconds to Roglic in final 50m, exposing kick differential on short steep ramps.

rider_signals.MAS Enrique: positive: only rider within shouting distance of Roglic on steep finish, clearly second-best GC option for Movistar
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: third on stage, Movistar has two viable GC cards with different finish profiles
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: gained 21 seconds including bonuses in final 200m after minimal front work, showing superior sprint on steep gradients
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: neutral: caught with 75-100m remaining after solo effort, nearly held but lacks kick on steepest gradients
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: neutral: retains red jersey at 2+ minutes over Roglic despite offering no resistance on finish climb
